label: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (Exam DVA-C02)
description: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (Exam DVA-C02) is a strictly practical study-notes course for AWS developers, focused on hands-on labs with AWS CLI v2, SDKs, Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, AWS CDK v2, and SAM. You’ll build and debug serverless applications, troubleshoot IAM and X-Ray issues, and automate deployment pipelines with CodePipeline using current AWS developer tools and runtimes.
